plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-473 RP15.P07.M06.S05-RP15.P08.M03.S21 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-473 implements descriptor-only coverage that closes the RP15.P07 phase (M06 Synthetic Fixture Set tail, M07 Test And Golden Case Set, M08 Hermes Evidence Packet, M09 Claude Review Packet, M10 Closeout And Next Handoff) and opens the RP15.P08 foundation (M00 Scope Inventory, M01 Contract Draft, M02 Type And Shape Definition, M03 Primary Implementation Slice head) as nine descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H15), Claude review packet (C15), and CP00-474 handoff, without opening analytics, Matter P&L, forecast, or WIP runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-473 is a descriptor-only RP15 analytics-core closeout pack (risk C, 150 units, RP15.P07.M06.S05-RP15.P08.M03.S21) that closes RP15.P07 (M06 tail through M10) and opens the RP15.P08 foundation (M00-M03 head) across 9 descriptor-only sections. Independent read-only inspection confirms full consistency across the authoritative closeout-pack-plan.json (ledger SHA 13c7ed65...), manifest, registry pack binding, requirements, no-write attestation, contract projection, README, and tests. All 7 required public exports exist and are wired through index.js; coverage/descriptor/Hermes/Claude/handoff validators are present and exercised by 3 dedicated model tests plus the contract validator script. Command-evidence shows every required validation command (closeout-pack-plan, rp05/rp00 core, npm test, validate, spec:requirements, weighted, fullplan, goal:closeout, git diff --check) at exit 0, Hermes gate H15 passed, with closeout-pack:validate correctly deferred as post-review gated. Authority boundaries are correctly enforced and test-asserted: Claude is read-only and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false), human approval required, no enterprise-trust claim from local validation, and Hermes patterns are descriptor/receipt-only with hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false. The pack honestly reports production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / implementation_layer=descriptor and does not overclaim. CP178+ review-hardening preconditions hold: auth preflight passed (exit 0, valid 1436-byte JSON, no stderr) and forbidden_review_evidence rejects auth failures, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing fields. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; one non-blocking P3 documents a pre-existing validator fallback that is not exercised for this pack. Pack and goal closeout are supported; final enterprise-trust approval remains with the human authority outside this read-only review.

findings.title: Contract validator falls back to manifest snapshot when pack absent from authoritative plan
findings.details: Line 274 resolves the plan pack as closeoutPlan.packs.find(pack => pack.pack_id === 'CP00-473') ?? cp473Manifest?.plan_binding_snapshot, and the assertion at line 329 ('CP00-473 must exist in closeout-pack-plan.json') is satisfied even by the manifest fallback. If a pack were ever absent from the authoritative docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json, the self-generated manifest plan_binding_snapshot would still satisfy the assertion and could mask a plan/manifest divergence. For CP00-473 this is not an actual problem: the authoritative plan (docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json:409) contains a matching entry (risk C, 150 units, range RP15.P07.M06.S05-RP15.P08.M03.S21, source_ledger_sha 13c7ed65...), so the fallback is never exercised. The pattern is pre-existing and identical across CP453-CP473 and is partially compensated by the independent npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate gate.
findings.recommendation: Optionally tighten the resolution so the assertion strictly requires the plan-sourced pack (not the manifest fallback) to honor the 'must exist in closeout-pack-plan.json' guarantee, or explicitly document that closeout-pack-plan:validate is the authoritative plan-presence gate. No change is required for CP00-473 closeout.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking informational observation. Verified CP00-473 is present and matching in the authoritative plan, so no divergence exists and the fallback is not triggered. Pre-existing cross-pack pattern not introduced by this pack; does not block pack or goal closeout.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-473 analytics core p07 closeout p08 foundation descriptor pack
